title: adonis coriacea
intro: Adonis coriacea, also known as the thin-leaved Adonis or white hellebore, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and is also believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system. Herbal preparations of Adonis coriacea, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to note that more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
